titleStmt.title: SII 16.74: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 74. (A.R. No. 13 of 1928.) BHAIRASAMUDRAM, KALYANADRUG TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the temple.
This is dated Śaka 1444, Chitrabhānu, Pushya śu. 10, Sunday, Makara-saṁkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1522, December 28.

It registers the grant of the village Bhairasamudram in Kugari-nāḍu, a subdivision of Kuṁdurupi-sīma in Rāyadurgam as sarvamānya to the god Tiruveṅgaḷanātha of Vēṁpalapariti, by Mahanāyaṅkāchārya Narasā-nāyaka, son of Kundurpi Timmināyaka. States that Kuṁdurupi-sīma was granted as nāyaṅkara to the donor by the king at the request of Konḍamarasayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayādbudaya śālivāha
na śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1444 Agunēṭi citrabhā sa
ṁvatsara puṣya śu 10 Ā śrīmadrājādhirāja rājapa
ramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīkṛṣṇarāyadēvamahā
rāyalu pṛthvīrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍagānu śrīmanma
hā nāyaṁkācā¨ryyulaina bhāṣadappuva nāyaṁka
ragaṁḍḍa marehokkarekāva kuṁduripiya tiṁmmināyani
koḍuku narasānāyanigāru veṁpalapariti tiruveṁgga
ḷanāṁthani Amṛtapaḷaku Aṁgaraṁgavaibhavālaku I
ccina dha¨rmmaśāsanakrama meṭlaṁnnanu rāyadu¨rgāna
ku jellēṭi kuṁdurupi sīmalōnu kugarināṁṭistaḷamaṁdu
bhairasamudramaneḍi grāmamu tatsaṁvatsa(ṁ)ra puṣya
śu 10 Ādivāraṁnāṁḍu makarasaṁkrāṁtti puṇya
kālamaṁdu rāyasaṁ koṁḍamarusayyagāriki pu
ṇyaṁgānuṁnnu tama taṁḍri kuṁduripi tiṁmānāya
nigāriki puṇyaṁgānu veṁpalaparuti tiruveṁggaḷanāṁtha
niki bhairasamudramanē grāmamu rāyalaku koṁḍḍamaru
sayyagāricēta viṁnnapaṁcēyiṁcci māku nāyaṁkkarā
naku pāliṁccina sīmalōnu bhairasamudramaneṭigrāma
mu vēṁpalaparuti tiruveṁggaḷanāṁthani Amṛtapaḷa
ku Aṁggaraṁggavaibhavālaku sama¨rpaṇacēsina bhairasamu
dramaneḍi grāmānaku kaligina catussīmalōni nīrāraṁbha
kāḍāraṁbha nūyi yātaṁ gūḍa gāreṁ kapila kālava
ceruU kuṁṭa suṁkka suva¨rnādāyaṁ mōdalayina nidhi
nikṣēpa jalapāṣāṇaAkṣiṇiĀgāmisiddhasādhyādu
lanēṭi Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāmya sarvōtpatti samasta baḷi sahi
taṁgānu veṁpalaparuti tiruveṁgaḷanāṁthaniki sama¨rpi
ṁcciyiccina dha¨rmmaśāsanamu veṁpalapalli tiruveṁggaḷa
nāṁthani sthānikulu kalukaḍa caṁnnamayya komāḷlū
śrīrāmayya Anaṁttayya kuppāḷamma komāruṁḍu
pinaAnaṁ ttayyagāriki A¨rcanāvritikigānu baiyira
samudraṁ catussīmalōnaina sakalādāya
ṁlōnu mī A¨rcanāvṛttiki sagaṁpāluṁnu
dēUni Amṛtapaḷaku Aṁgaraṁgavaibhavālaku
sagaṁpāluṁnnu dhāravōsi yistimi maṁtrapu
ṣpālavāriki dēUni sakaṁpālilōnu veṁpalapa
rati sūrājōśyulugāriki ceṟuU kiṁdanu maḍi
kha 01 nnu brāṁhmalapalli tiṁmayyagāriki maḍi kha

damaged
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ
paradattānupālanaṁ . pa
radattāpahārēṇa svadatta
ṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 16.74 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
